message:
fix(core): three-valued NULL logic in eval_join_binary_op

Comparison operators (Eq, Ne, Lt, Le, Gt, Ge) now return NULL when
either operand is NULL instead of using cmp_values sort-order semantics.
AND/OR now implement proper three-valued logic matching SQL standard:
FALSE AND NULL = FALSE, TRUE AND NULL = NULL, TRUE OR NULL = TRUE,
FALSE OR NULL = NULL.

Adds 5 regression tests. 230 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
